Tamil language news and content portal at nammatamil.live. Covers Tamil Nadu politics, culture, cinema, and current affairs. Free, updated daily.

# NammaTamil

NammaTamil (nammatamil.live) is an AI-curated Tamil language news portal serving the global Tamil community.

## Content
- Tamil Nadu politics and governance
- Tamil cinema and entertainment
- Tamil culture, arts, and literature
- Sports — especially cricket and kabaddi
- Technology and science news
- Current affairs and breaking news

## Language
Primary language: Tamil (ta-IN). Some content in English.

## Update frequency
Daily — news aggregated and summarised from trusted Tamil media sources.

## Access
Free to read. No registration required.

## Contact
Site: https://nammatamil.live
